name: toc-sidebar-splitter
title: Resizable table of contents sidebar

entries.note: Added persistent table-of-contents width setting with clamped localStorage loading and saving.
Added the ToC resize separator, pointer drag handling, keyboard resize handling, and dynamic CSS width wiring.

verification.outcome: npm run check passed with 0 errors and the existing 14 warnings; no new ToC separator warnings remain.
npm run build completed successfully; Vite emitted existing warnings and chunk-size notices only.
git diff --check passed and grep found no remaining hard-coded ToC width controls for 240px/TOC_WIDTH.
Final self-check: implementation matches plan, keeps ToC width clamped and persisted, updates left/right and pinned/overlay layout from one CSS variable, and keeps scope limited to ToC behavior.

final_result: Added a resizable table-of-contents sidebar with persisted width, pointer drag support, keyboard resizing, and dynamic layout wiring.
